title: Black & Silver Plastic Professional Hair Dressing Set, 4 Pieces - Durable & Long-Lasting for All Styling Needs, Suitable for Home & Professional Use
features: COMPLETE HAIR STYLING KIT: Upgrade your hairdressing toolkit with our black & silver professional 4-piece set, including a pair of meticulously crafted hairdressing scissors, a versatile comb, and two durable hair clips.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted for longevity and performance, each item in this set is made from high-grade metal and sturdy plastic, ensuring that your hairdressing tools remain reliable for both professional salon and home-use scenarios.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN FOR COMFORT: Designed with professionals in mind, the hairdressing scissors feature an ergonomic grip that reduces hand fatigue, making them perfect for prolonged use during detailed styling sessions.

VERSATILE USE: Whether you're a seasoned hairstylist or a beginner undertaking DIY hair projects at home, this set's combined efficiency and precision make it ideal for a wide range of hair-cutting and styling tasks.

SHARP & PRECISE CUTTING: Our hairdressing scissors are finely crafted to deliver sharp and precise cuts every time. Whether you're trimming bangs or cutting layers, these scissors glide through the hair with ease.
description: Product Description This hairdressing set is ideal for you to make a professional haircut or create a perfect hairstyle. Safety Warning No warning applicable
